case_title: DONOVAN, CHRISTINA vs. MARCACCINI, LAWRENCE D. et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONOVAN, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT MARCACCINI, LAWRENCE D. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MARCACCINI, LAWRENCE D. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MARCACCINI, LAWRENCE D.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MARCACCINI, LAWRENCE D.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONOVAN, CHRISTINA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-13-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 02 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-19-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 2, JUDGE PRO TEM ALFRED KNOLLS CSR, DEBBIE NEVILLE CLERK, E.MONTI 4:50 PM. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF COUNSEL, ROBERT SMITHTON PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. A JUDG- MENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FORTHWITH FOR REST & POSS LOCATED AT 1225 PINE STREET, #2,SF. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH BUT STAYED TO 3-1-94. DEFT WILL VACATE BY 2-28-94, 5PM. DEFT TO PAY $2066.00 BACK RENT. ATTY FEES & SEC DEPOSIT WAIVED. PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN BROOMCLEAN CONDITION. NO OTHER OCCUPANTS MAY CLAIM THE UNIT. EACH SIDE WAIVE ANY OTHER CLAIMS. DEFT AD- VISED THAT ANY PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND IS DEEMED ABANDONED. DEFT TO PAY THE $2066.00 IN $100 INSTALLMENTS, STARTING 5-1-94 TO PLTF BY CASHIER CHECK OR MONEY ORDER. DEFT WAIVES ANY STAYS. WHEN PAYMENT MADE & DEFT MOVES, PLTF TO VACATE JUDGMENT & FILE DISMISSAL W/PREJ. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
